Description: 5 stages of holding/tapping a button where the correct interaction depends on the previous button's label, color, or position. Tags: button, red, white, blue, yellow, detonate, abort, press, hold, display
Name: Button Memory

Souvenir.Explanation: Souvenir could ask about the displays in each of the 5 stages, or the color the LED if the button was held in any of those stages.
